expectations.evidence: Transcript states: "This is not valid JSON" and "Malformed JSON -> STOP. Tell user: 'Project config is corrupted. Run /rawgentic:setup to regenerate.'" The outcome section confirms: "WORKFLOW HALTED -- Config Loading Failed" and "contains corrupted/malformed JSON."
Transcript explicitly states the message to user: "Project config is corrupted. Run /rawgentic:setup to regenerate." The /rawgentic:setup reference is present.
